use_cases: Interactive background for landing pages and hero sections
Creative coding demonstration and art installations
Engaging visual element for marketing and portfolio websites
Real-time fluid physics visualization for educational purposes
Decorative animated component for SaaS dashboards
ai_summary: A sophisticated interactive fluid dynamics simulation component that renders realistic fluid behavior on canvas. The simulation responds to pointer movement, adding velocity and density to create organic flowing effects with a configurable heat map color palette ranging from black to white through red and yellow. Supports extensive customization including viscosity, diffusion, animation control, and visual toggles for density and velocity fields.
